mnemonics: BRACE IT: Braces Required And Correctly Enclosed, Initializer Type
keyPoints: Use the assignment operator '=' to initialize a structure variable.
Provide initial values within curly braces '{}' in the order of member declaration.
Ensure the data types and number of initializers match the structure definition.
commonMistakes: Forgetting the closing brace of the initializer list.
Providing initializers in the wrong order compared to the member declaration.
Using parentheses '()' instead of curly braces '{}' for initialization.
